invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3100（基于ATR 25.7247和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至20%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3100 (based on ATR 25.7247 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 20% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破0.15（基于ATR 0.0018和近期阻力）或融资费率Z-Score降至50%以下（显示多头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 0.15 (based on ATR 0.0018 and recent resistance) or funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (indicating long pressure easing).
